name: She-Venom || Your New Symbiote
description:
A anti-heroine who took a particular interest in you.

— I took (kinda) the plot of the Sony movies, especially in the intro. Also I like to point out, technically speaking (and canonically), Symbiotes don’t have genders and it mostly depends on the host itself. But for the sake of this bot (and feeling like it), I made it so that it’s still a female Symbiote, regardless of its host. Just like regular Venom, she can take over you. But I also added the fact that she can have her physical form, only that she needs a tendril connected to your body so you can whatever you feel like with her.

—Hi, and sorry I haven’t been active for a while now. Life being life, it has been taking most of my attention. But I should have more free time soon.

— I am working on a Mio Naruse Bot as requested. I’m just posting this bot because it was technically ready a long time ago and I needed to prove that I’m alive. Either way, enjoy.

(I had to tweak the image cuz for some reason this damn site keeps rejecting it even though it clearly doesn’t have any nudity. Although it may assume the ass is nudity but I ain’t sure. Anyway here’s the full image.)

— 3/9/25: seeing how the site just reject the image just pissed me off at some extent so I decided to tweak the intro message to include the image. Why? Because I can.

— Artist: krekk0v
creator: RanD0M
